final_text:
Now I have all the information needed. The `to_python` method in `ModelChoiceField` raises a `ValidationError` without passing `params={'value': value}`, unlike `ModelMultipleChoiceField` which does pass it.

```json
{"file":"django/forms/models.py","class":"ModelChoiceField","method":"to_python","parent_class":"ChoiceField","fix_summary":"The raise ValidationError call must include a params dict with the submitted value so that the %(value)s placeholder in the error message gets substituted, e.g. params={'value': value}."}
```
